entries.name: WILLAM
entries.letter:
Dear Future Me,

I don’t know where you are right now or what life looks like for you. Maybe things turned out exactly how you planned, or maybe life surprised you with a completely different path. Either way, I hope you’re doing well.

Right now, life feels like it’s just beginning. There are so many dreams, so many ideas, and so many questions about what the future holds. I hope you didn’t give up on those dreams. I hope you kept the curiosity, the ambition, and the determination to keep learning and growing.

Remember the people who were part of this chapter of your life. The friends who made ordinary days unforgettable, the teachers who pushed you to be better, and the small moments that once felt normal but were actually special.

If things ever became difficult along the way, I hope you stayed strong and kept moving forward. And if life became successful and comfortable, I hope you stayed humble and kind.

Most importantly, I hope you’re happy. Not just successful, but genuinely happy with the life you built.

Wherever you are right now, remember where you started — and be proud of how far you’ve come.

Sincerely,
William

entries.name: Christopher
entries.letter:
Dear Future Me,

I don’t know where life has taken you by the time you read this. Maybe you’re living the dreams you once talked about, or maybe life has taken you somewhere you never expected. Either way, I hope you’re proud of the journey.

Right now, everything feels like the beginning of something bigger. There are so many goals, so many plans, and a lot of hope about what the future might look like. I hope you never stopped chasing those dreams, even when things got difficult.

Remember the people who were part of this chapter of your life. The friends who made you laugh on the toughest days, the teachers who guided you, and the small moments that seemed ordinary but actually meant a lot.

If life became busy, I hope you didn’t forget to enjoy it. If things ever got hard, I hope you stayed strong and kept moving forward.

Most importantly, I hope you stayed kind, stayed curious, and stayed true to who you are.

And when you look back at this time, I hope you remember it with a smile.

Sincerely,
Christopher

entries.name: Gabriel
entries.letter:
Dear Future Me,

I don’t know where you are right now or what life looks like for you. Maybe you’ve achieved the dreams you once imagined, or maybe you’ve discovered completely new ones along the way.

Right now, life feels like a starting point — full of possibilities, hopes, and questions about the future. I hope you stayed curious and never stopped learning, no matter where life took you.

Remember the people who were part of this journey. The friends who made you laugh, the teachers who guided you, and the memories that once felt ordinary but later became special.

If things became difficult, I hope you kept going and never lost faith in yourself. And if life brought success, I hope you stayed humble and grateful.

Most of all, I hope you’re happy with the person you’ve become.

When you read this, take a moment to remember where it all began.

Sincerely,
Gabriel

If you want, I can also write shorter “Dear Future Me” letters (more emotional and impactful) that work better for a farewell website card.
